channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Police arrest man for allegedly beating wife to death in Nasarawa
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: According to the suspect's confession, he acted out of anger after the deceased allegedly refused to prepare food, following an argument that ensued, which escalated into a physical altercation that ultimately resulted in her death; however, he expressed remorse over his actions. The post Police arr

item.title: Transfer: Trossard agrees deal to leave Arsenal
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Arsenal forward, Leandro Trossard, is close to agreeing personal terms with Besiktas ahead of a summer move. According to The Athletic, the agreement between both clubs is in it final stages. Besiktas will pay the Premier League champions a fee around €18m upfront and €2m in add-ons. Trossard is exp

item.title: Transfer: Portuguese club SC Braga sign Nigerian youngster
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Portuguese Primeira Liga club SC Braga have completed the signing of Nigerian defender Adebisi Olamikun from Inter Lagos, DAILY POST reports. The Minho Warriors beat competition from other top clubs in Europe to the signature of the young centre-back. Olamikun signed a long-term contract with SC Bra

item.title: ‘I don’t need to be presidential candidate to educate you’ – Umahi hits back at Peter Obi
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Nigeria’s Minister of Works, Dave Umahi, has fired back at the presidential candidate of the Nigerian Democratic Congress (NDC), Peter Obi, saying he does not need to be a presidential candidate to educate the former Anambra State governor on infrastructure. Addressing journalists at a constru

item.title: Lindsey Graham likely died from aortic rupture, medical examiner says
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: US Senator Lindsey Graham, a close ally of President Donald Trump and a leading Republican voice on foreign policy, died on Saturday after a brief illness, his office said. He was 71. The District of Columbia medical examiner said the preliminary cause of death was an aortic dissection linked to art

item.title: Nigerian army foils kidnap attempt, rescues four victims in Sokoto
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Troops of the Nigerian Army’s Operation FANSAN YAMMA have successfully thwarted a kidnapping attempt by suspected terrorists in Surimi, in Danko-Wasagu Local Government Area of Kebbi State, which borders Sokoto State. The army said that the troops rescued four individuals who had been kidnappe

item.title: ‘Let him say whatever he wants’ – Konate slams Yamal ahead of Spain clash
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: France defender Ibrahima Konate has brushed aside Lamine Yamal's bold pre-match comments as the reigning European champions prepare to face Spain in the 2026 FIFA World Cup semi-final on Tuesday. The post ‘Let him say whatever he wants’ – Konate slams Yamal ahead of Spain clash app

item.title: Nigerian army crushes ISWAP infiltration attempt in Cross Kauwa
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Nigerian Army has said that its troops of 19 Brigade, Sector 3, Joint Task Force North East, Operation HADIN KAI, OPHK, have decisively foiled an attempted infiltration by ISWAP terrorists into Cross Kauwa, Kukawa Local Government Area of Borno State, inflicting heavy casualties on the attackers

item.title: Argentina Legend Antonio Rattín Dies At 89 Ahead Of England World Cup Showdown
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Argentina football legend Antonio Rattín, the former national team captain famously sent off during the 1966 FIFA World Cup quarter-final against England, has died at the age of 89. Rattín’s death was confirmed by his lifelong club Boca Juniors on Saturday, coinciding with Argentina and England both

item.title: Sinner shatters Zverev’s Wimbledon dream, retains crown
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: World number one Jannik Sinner fought back from a set down to defeat Alexander Zverev and successfully defend his Wimbledon title on Sunday.

item.title: Northern Groups Demand Release Of Abducted Borno Pupils After Oyo Rescue
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The Coalition of Northern Groups (CNG) has urged the Federal Government and security agencies to immediately intensify efforts to secure the release of schoolchildren abducted in Borno State, saying they deserve the same urgency that led to the rescue of pupils kidnapped in Oyo State. The group, whi

item.title: Lindsey Graham, hardline backer of US-Israeli wars, dies aged 71
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: US senator Lindsey Graham, a key ally of Israel and one of Washington’s most prominent foreign policy hawks, has died.

item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Former Emir of Qatar Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani has died at age 74.

item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: The Italian was rewarded for his perseverance in an attritional contest with his first Grand Slam title since lifting the trophy at the All England Club 12 months ago. Data released by the Nigerian Upstream Petroleum Regulatory Commission for the

He insisted that leadership should be judged by verifiable achievements rather t

item.title: Police arrest 14 suspected drug dealers in Yobe
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Fourteen suspected hard drug dealers have been arrested by the Yobe State Police Command. The confirmation of the arrest was contained in a statement signed by the Command PPRO, SP Dungus Abdulkarim. He stated that the development was in continuation of sustained operations against criminal activiti

item.title: NPFL: Ubong Williams moves to Rivers United from Bayelsa United
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Ubong Williams has sealed a move to Nigeria Premier Football League (NPFL) outfit Rivers United.Williams joined the Pride of Rivers on a permanent transfer from Bayelsa United. The defender left Bayelsa United following the club’s relegation from the NPFL. Williams featured regularly for the P

item.title: Lagos task force impounds 309 motorcycles
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The Lagos State taskforce said 309 commercial motorcycles were impounded during operation along the Lagos-Badagry Expressway. The post Lagos task force impounds 309 motorcycles appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: Zuchu and husband Diamond Platnumz part ways after six years
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Tanzanian singer Zuchu has announced the collapse of her marriage to music star and label boss Diamond Platnumz.

item.dc:creator: France 24

item.description: Footage shared online by first responders showed a huge blaze raging in the Na Ladprao pub.

item.description: The Federal Government has arrested two suspected illegal miners and shut down an illegal mining site in Osun State during a coordinated enforcement operation targeting illicit mining activities. According to a report by The Punch, the suspects, Danladi Isa and Musa Kabiru, both in their twenties an

item.description: A political support group, the Northern Nigeria Support Group for Seyi Makinde, has organised a special prayer session and a horse race in Kano to canvass support for the Oyo State Governor ahead of the 2027 presidential election. Speaking during the event, the National President of the group, Baban

item.title: Nigeria’s daily oil production rises by 2.3% to 1.74mbpd
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Data released by the Nigerian Upstream Petroleum Regulatory Commission (NUPRC) on Sunday showed that average crude oil production, excluding condensates, increased to 1.56 million barrels per day in June from 1.53 million barrels per day in May. The post Nigeria’s daily oil production rises by

item.title: Tinubu’s Re-Nomination Of Shettima Shows Stability – Plang
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Senator Diket Plang, representing Plateau Central Senatorial District, has described President Bola Tinubu’s decision to retain Vice President Kashim Shettima on the All Progressives Congress, APC, 2027 presidential ticket as a demonstration of stability, courage and continuity in governance.

item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The company warned that any Dangote truck found transporting unauthorized goods would be treated as involved in illegal haulage activities, adding that both the drivers and the owners of such goods risk arrest, confiscation of the cargo, and prosecution under applicable laws. item.dc:creator: TVC News

item.title: Nigeria Strike Gold With 14-Medal Haul At Uganda Para Badminton International
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Nigeria’s para badminton team delivered an outstanding performance at the 2026 Uganda Para Badminton International Championship, returning home with an impressive haul of 14 medals, comprising nine gold and five silver. The championship, held in Uganda from 7 to 12 July, further cemented Nigeria’s g

item.title: 2030 World Cup: FIFA mulls 64- team format
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: South American nations Uruguay, Argentina and Paraguay will each host an opening match. The rest of the tournament will be played in Morocco, Portugal and Spain.

item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The National Chairman of the African Democratic Congress (ADC), Senator David Mark, has advised graduating students to place integrity above money and quick success, saying “wealth acquired without honour is fleeting.” Senator Mark gave the advice on Sunday at the 2026 Graduation, Speech and Prize-G

Speaking while receiving his Oyo State counterpart, Governor Seyi Makinde, in

item.title: Zamfara Unveils $200m Lithium Plant, Targets Jobs, Value Addition
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Governor Dauda Lawal has commissioned a $200 million lithium mining and processing plant in Zamfara State, declaring that the state's future prosperity depends on responsible management of its vast mineral resources, local value addition and job creation. item.title: Sinner Beats Zverev To Retain Wimbledon Title

item.title: NBA Election: Yoruba Lawyers condemns attacks on AGF Fagbemi over poll directive
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: From Godwin Tsa, Abuja The pan-Yoruba lawyers’ group, Egbe Amofin O’odua, has criticised Nigerian Bar Association (NBA) President Mazi Afam Osigwe (SAN) and others for attacking Attorney General of the Federation and Minister of Justice, Lateef Fagbemi (SAN), over his directive on the NB

item.title: Kim ends 1,001-day wait for win as Fitzpatrick, MacIntyre fall short in Scotland
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Tom Kim ended his 1,001-day wait for a fourth PGA Tour title by closing out an impressive two-shot win at the Genesis Scottish Open, as Robert MacIntyre missed out on a home victory.

item.title: Ex-minister Nnaji, ‘fake’ agency DG, Adeyemi set for arraignment
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Former Minister of Science and Technology, Chief Uche Nnaji and Prince Adeniyi Adeyemi, the Director-General (DG) of a “non-existent” Presidential Foreign Intervention Promotion Council (PFIPC), are to be arraigned before a Federal High Court sitting in Abuja, Monday and Tuesday, respect

item.title: Oyo Yoruba Traditional Religion Serves As Vital Mechanism For Checkmating Insecurity – Alaafin
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Alaafin of Oyo, Oba Abimbola Akeem Owoade 1, has said that the Oyo Yoruba traditional religion serves as a vital, localized mechanism for checkmating insecurity in the country. He stated that utilizing spiritual intelligence, communal oath-taking, and localized intelligence networks will work al

item.title: Zulum orders automatic employment for 17 volunteer nurses in Biu
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Borno State Governor, Professor Babagana Zulum, has announced automatic employment for 17 volunteer Nurses serving at the General Hospital, Biu, assuring that more medical personnel would be recruited to strengthen healthcare delivery in the area. The Governor made the announcement on Sunday while i

item.title: Premium Times reporter shortlisted for solution journalism award
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: “Your nomination is a testament to your outstanding commitment to strengthening communities, advancing civic participation, and driving positive change,” the organisers told the reporter in a letter on Saturday. The post Premium Times reporter shortlisted for solution journalism award appeared fir

item.title: EFCC appeals N10m defamation judgment in Agunloye case
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) has appealed the judgment of the Federal Capital Territory (FCT) High Court in Abuja, which awarded N10 million in damages to former Minister of Power, Olu Agunloye, over a social media publication linking him to the alleged $6 billion Mambilla Pow

item.title: Anthony Zurcher: From Trump critic to ally, Lindsey Graham was a political survivor of the Maga era
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: The senator's career was marked by a willingness to adapt to America's dramatically changing political climate, writes the BBC's North America correspondent.

item.title: Boko Haram used ChatGPT, other AI tools to plan attacks, build bombs – Report
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The report titled ‘God has helped us, and so will AI: How the Terrorist Group Boko Haram Uses Frontier AI’ is based primarily on 57 interviews with 27 former Boko Haram members. The post Boko Haram used ChatGPT, other AI tools to plan attacks, build bombs – Report appeared first on Premium Tim

item.title: Arsenal want Argentina's Alvarez - Monday's gossip
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Arsenal want to sign Atletico Madrid's Julian Alvarez, Aston Villa hijack Newcastle's move for Johan Manzambi, plus more.

item.title: More flights head to PH Int’l Airport after global status upgrade certification
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay
item.description: …FAAN presents certificate to Fubara More international flights are said to be headed to the Port Harcourt International Airport following read more More flights head to PH Int’l Airport after global status upgrade certification

item.title: Shall We Go On Sinning So That Grace May Increase? is hypnotic, healing, and hopeful
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Matmos are an incredibly accomplished duo between their own solo records like the masterpiece A Chance to Cut Is a Chance to Cure and production classic Bjork records like Vespertine. But Drew Daniel, one half of Matmos, is fiendishly prolific. When he's not literally dreaming up new viral music gen

item.title: PHOTOS: Foreign fighters, medics supporting ISWAP amid cholera outbreak
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay
item.description: The military has confirmed that preliminary forensic findings from a foiled ISWAP attacked on Kukawa Local Government Area of Borno read more PHOTOS: Foreign fighters, medics supporting ISWAP amid cholera outbreak
